# Figures

<!--
Auto-generated by the BET results task. Edit this file in the report repository to choose, remove, reorder, or rewrite figures.
If this section file is deleted, the next report job will seed a fresh copy from generated/outputs/report-ready/figures.qmd.
-->

## Main figure set

### CPUE observed and fitted

<!-- figure: cpue-fits -->
![Observed and fitted CPUE. Points show observed index values and fitted lines show model predictions; facets and legends identify selected fisheries, CPUE series, and assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/cpue-fits.png){#fig-cpue-fits fig-align="center" width=100%}

### CPUE regional share

<!-- figure: cpue-regional-share -->
![Regional CPUE share compared with regional biomass share. Bars or points compare the regional distribution of the selected CPUE series with the selected biomass basis, highlighting scale or spatial consistency across regions.](generated/outputs/figures/cpue-regional-share.png){#fig-cpue-regional-share fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Retrospective diagnostics

<!-- figure: retrospective-diagnostics -->
![Retrospective diagnostics. Lines compare depletion and spawning-potential estimates from peel runs against the reference model.](generated/outputs/figures/retrospective-diagnostics.png){#fig-retrospective-diagnostics fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Key quantities

<!-- figure: key-quantities -->
![Key derived quantities. Panels show dynamic spawning depletion \(SB/SB\[F=0\]\), recruitment, spawning potential, and annual instantaneous fishing mortality through time. Lines identify the selected assessment models; the depletion panel includes dashed reference lines at 0.2 and 0.5.](generated/outputs/figures/key-quantities.png){#fig-key-quantities fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Depletion by area

<!-- figure: depletion-by-area -->
![Dynamic spawning depletion by model region. Panels or line groups identify model areas, and colours identify selected assessment models so regional depletion patterns can be compared through time.](generated/outputs/figures/depletion-by-area.png){#fig-depletion-by-area fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Recruitment by area

<!-- figure: recruitment-by-area -->
![Estimated annual recruitment by model region. Panels or line groups identify model areas, and colours identify selected assessment models so spatial recruitment patterns can be compared through time.](generated/outputs/figures/recruitment-by-area.png){#fig-recruitment-by-area fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Kobe plot

<!-- figure: kobe-plot -->
![Kobe stock-status trajectory. Points and connecting paths show the trajectory through time relative to biomass and fishing-intensity reference axes; colours identify selected assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/kobe-plot.png){#fig-kobe-plot fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Majuro plot

<!-- figure: majuro-plot -->
![Majuro stock-status trajectory. Points and connecting paths show depletion and fishing intensity through time; colours identify selected assessment models and reference zones aid stock-status interpretation.](generated/outputs/figures/majuro-plot.png){#fig-majuro-plot fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Juvenile and adult fishing mortality by area

<!-- figure: f-juvenile-adult-by-area -->
![Juvenile and adult annual instantaneous fishing mortality by model region. Panels or line groups separate juvenile and adult components and identify regional differences through time.](generated/outputs/figures/f-juvenile-adult-by-area.png){#fig-f-juvenile-adult-by-area fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Area contribution to fishing mortality

<!-- figure: f-area-contribution -->
![Regional contribution to total annual instantaneous fishing mortality. Stacked or faceted values show how each model area contributes to total F through time for the selected assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/f-area-contribution.png){#fig-f-area-contribution fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Spawning potential with and without fishing

<!-- figure: spawning-potential-with-without-fishing -->
![Spawning potential with and without fishing. Lines compare estimated fishing conditions with no-fishing reference conditions through time for the selected assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/spawning-potential-with-without-fishing.png){#fig-spawning-potential-with-without-fishing fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Total biomass with and without fishing

<!-- figure: total-biomass-with-without-fishing -->
![Total biomass with and without fishing. Lines compare estimated fishing conditions with no-fishing reference conditions through time for the selected assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/total-biomass-with-without-fishing.png){#fig-total-biomass-with-without-fishing fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Stock status

<!-- figure: stock-status -->
![Stock status. The upper panel shows dynamic spawning depletion \(SB/SB\[F=0\]\) with dashed reference lines at 0.2 and 0.5; the lower panel shows estimated annual recruitment. Line colours and the legend identify the selected assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/stock-status.png){#fig-stock-status fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Tag reporting rates

<!-- figure: tagging-dynamics -->
![Estimated tag reporting rates. Distributions or intervals summarize reporting-rate estimates by tag reporting group; colours and facets identify selected assessment models or grouping variables.](generated/outputs/figures/tagging-dynamics.png){#fig-tagging-dynamics fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Tag returns over time

<!-- figure: tag-returns-all -->
![Observed tag returns over time, with all recapture fisheries combined. Lines and facets identify selected assessment models and the temporal pattern of total tag returns.](generated/outputs/figures/tag-returns-all.png){#fig-tag-returns-all fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Tag returns by recapture group

<!-- figure: tag-returns-by-group -->
![Observed tag returns over time by recapture group. Panels or colours identify recapture groups and selected assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/tag-returns-by-group.png){#fig-tag-returns-by-group fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Tag attrition

<!-- figure: tag-attrition-all -->
![Tag attrition through time, with all recapture fisheries combined. Lines summarize the decline in available tag cohorts through time for selected assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/tag-attrition-all.png){#fig-tag-attrition-all fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Tag attrition by program

<!-- figure: tag-attrition-by-program -->
![Tag attrition through time by tagging program. Panels or colours identify tag programs and selected assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/tag-attrition-by-program.png){#fig-tag-attrition-by-program fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Tag attrition by recapture region

<!-- figure: tag-attrition-by-region -->
![Tag attrition through time by recapture region. Panels or colours identify regions and selected assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/tag-attrition-by-region.png){#fig-tag-attrition-by-region fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Regional movement

<!-- figure: regional-movement -->
![Estimated quarterly regional movement. Matrix cells show movement probabilities from origin to destination regions; facets identify quarters or assessment models where available.](generated/outputs/figures/regional-movement.png){#fig-regional-movement fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Stock-recruitment relationship

<!-- figure: population-biology -->
![Stock-recruitment relationship. Points or lines show annual recruitment against adult biomass or spawning biomass; facets and legends identify selected assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/population-biology.png){#fig-population-biology fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Maturity at age

<!-- figure: maturity-at-age -->
![Maturity at age. Curves show the proportion mature by age class for selected assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/maturity-at-age.png){#fig-maturity-at-age fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Natural mortality at age

<!-- figure: natural-mortality-at-age -->
![Natural mortality at age. Curves show the assumed or estimated natural mortality schedule by age class for selected assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/natural-mortality-at-age.png){#fig-natural-mortality-at-age fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Growth curve

<!-- figure: growth-curve -->
![Growth curve. Lines show predicted mean length at age, and any shaded band indicates the configured growth uncertainty interval for selected assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/growth-curve.png){#fig-growth-curve fig-align="center" width=100%}

## Appendix figure set

### CPUE residuals

<!-- figure: cpue-residuals -->
![CPUE residuals. Values show observed minus fitted CPUE for selected index fisheries; facets and legends identify assessment models and CPUE series.](generated/outputs/figures/cpue-residuals.png){#fig-cpue-residuals fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency fits

<!-- figure: length-frequency -->
![Observed and fitted length-frequency samples. Bars show observed sample counts and fitted overlays show model predictions; panels identify selected fisheries and years, and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency.png){#fig-length-frequency fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency residuals

<!-- figure: length-frequency-residuals -->
![Length-frequency bubble residuals. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by length bin, fishery, and year for the selected assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-residuals.png){#fig-length-frequency-residuals fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency fits: 01.LL.WEST.1

<!-- figure: length-frequency-fishery-1-01-ll-west-1 -->
![Observed and fitted length-frequency samples for 01.LL.WEST.1. Bars show observed sample counts by length bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-fishery-1-01-ll-west-1.png){#fig-length-frequency-fishery-1-01-ll-west-1 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency fits: 02.LL.EAST.1

<!-- figure: length-frequency-fishery-2-02-ll-east-1 -->
![Observed and fitted length-frequency samples for 02.LL.EAST.1. Bars show observed sample counts by length bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-fishery-2-02-ll-east-1.png){#fig-length-frequency-fishery-2-02-ll-east-1 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency fits: 03.LL.US.1

<!-- figure: length-frequency-fishery-3-03-ll-us-1 -->
![Observed and fitted length-frequency samples for 03.LL.US.1. Bars show observed sample counts by length bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-fishery-3-03-ll-us-1.png){#fig-length-frequency-fishery-3-03-ll-us-1 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency fits: 04.LL.ALL.2

<!-- figure: length-frequency-fishery-4-04-ll-all-2 -->
![Observed and fitted length-frequency samples for 04.LL.ALL.2. Bars show observed sample counts by length bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-fishery-4-04-ll-all-2.png){#fig-length-frequency-fishery-4-04-ll-all-2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency fits: 05.LL.OS.2

<!-- figure: length-frequency-fishery-5-05-ll-os-2 -->
![Observed and fitted length-frequency samples for 05.LL.OS.2. Bars show observed sample counts by length bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-fishery-5-05-ll-os-2.png){#fig-length-frequency-fishery-5-05-ll-os-2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency fits: 06.LL.ARCH.3

<!-- figure: length-frequency-fishery-6-06-ll-arch-3 -->
![Observed and fitted length-frequency samples for 06.LL.ARCH.3. Bars show observed sample counts by length bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-fishery-6-06-ll-arch-3.png){#fig-length-frequency-fishery-6-06-ll-arch-3 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency fits: 07.LL.WEST.3

<!-- figure: length-frequency-fishery-7-07-ll-west-3 -->
![Observed and fitted length-frequency samples for 07.LL.WEST.3. Bars show observed sample counts by length bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-fishery-7-07-ll-west-3.png){#fig-length-frequency-fishery-7-07-ll-west-3 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency fits: 08.LL.EAST.3

<!-- figure: length-frequency-fishery-8-08-ll-east-3 -->
![Observed and fitted length-frequency samples for 08.LL.EAST.3. Bars show observed sample counts by length bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-fishery-8-08-ll-east-3.png){#fig-length-frequency-fishery-8-08-ll-east-3 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency fits: 09.LL.OS.3

<!-- figure: length-frequency-fishery-9-09-ll-os-3 -->
![Observed and fitted length-frequency samples for 09.LL.OS.3. Bars show observed sample counts by length bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-fishery-9-09-ll-os-3.png){#fig-length-frequency-fishery-9-09-ll-os-3 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency fits: 10.LL.ALL.5

<!-- figure: length-frequency-fishery-10-10-ll-all-5 -->
![Observed and fitted length-frequency samples for 10.LL.ALL.5. Bars show observed sample counts by length bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-fishery-10-10-ll-all-5.png){#fig-length-frequency-fishery-10-10-ll-all-5 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency fits: 11.LL.AU.5

<!-- figure: length-frequency-fishery-11-11-ll-au-5 -->
![Observed and fitted length-frequency samples for 11.LL.AU.5. Bars show observed sample counts by length bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-fishery-11-11-ll-au-5.png){#fig-length-frequency-fishery-11-11-ll-au-5 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency fits: 12.PS.JP.1

<!-- figure: length-frequency-fishery-12-12-ps-jp-1 -->
![Observed and fitted length-frequency samples for 12.PS.JP.1. Bars show observed sample counts by length bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-fishery-12-12-ps-jp-1.png){#fig-length-frequency-fishery-12-12-ps-jp-1 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency fits: 13.PL.JP.1

<!-- figure: length-frequency-fishery-13-13-pl-jp-1 -->
![Observed and fitted length-frequency samples for 13.PL.JP.1. Bars show observed sample counts by length bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-fishery-13-13-pl-jp-1.png){#fig-length-frequency-fishery-13-13-pl-jp-1 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency fits: 14.HL.ID.2

<!-- figure: length-frequency-fishery-14-14-hl-id-2 -->
![Observed and fitted length-frequency samples for 14.HL.ID.2. Bars show observed sample counts by length bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-fishery-14-14-hl-id-2.png){#fig-length-frequency-fishery-14-14-hl-id-2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency fits: 15.HL.PH.2

<!-- figure: length-frequency-fishery-15-15-hl-ph-2 -->
![Observed and fitted length-frequency samples for 15.HL.PH.2. Bars show observed sample counts by length bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-fishery-15-15-hl-ph-2.png){#fig-length-frequency-fishery-15-15-hl-ph-2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency fits: 16.PL.ALL.2

<!-- figure: length-frequency-fishery-16-16-pl-all-2 -->
![Observed and fitted length-frequency samples for 16.PL.ALL.2. Bars show observed sample counts by length bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-fishery-16-16-pl-all-2.png){#fig-length-frequency-fishery-16-16-pl-all-2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency fits: 17.PS.ID.2

<!-- figure: length-frequency-fishery-17-17-ps-id-2 -->
![Observed and fitted length-frequency samples for 17.PS.ID.2. Bars show observed sample counts by length bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-fishery-17-17-ps-id-2.png){#fig-length-frequency-fishery-17-17-ps-id-2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency fits: 18.PS.PH.2

<!-- figure: length-frequency-fishery-18-18-ps-ph-2 -->
![Observed and fitted length-frequency samples for 18.PS.PH.2. Bars show observed sample counts by length bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-fishery-18-18-ps-ph-2.png){#fig-length-frequency-fishery-18-18-ps-ph-2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency residuals: 01.LL.WEST.1

<!-- figure: length-frequency-residuals-fishery-1-01-ll-west-1 -->
![Length-frequency bubble residuals for 01.LL.WEST.1. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by length bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-residuals-fishery-1-01-ll-west-1.png){#fig-length-frequency-residuals-fishery-1-01-ll-west-1 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency residuals: 02.LL.EAST.1

<!-- figure: length-frequency-residuals-fishery-2-02-ll-east-1 -->
![Length-frequency bubble residuals for 02.LL.EAST.1. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by length bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-residuals-fishery-2-02-ll-east-1.png){#fig-length-frequency-residuals-fishery-2-02-ll-east-1 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency residuals: 03.LL.US.1

<!-- figure: length-frequency-residuals-fishery-3-03-ll-us-1 -->
![Length-frequency bubble residuals for 03.LL.US.1. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by length bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-residuals-fishery-3-03-ll-us-1.png){#fig-length-frequency-residuals-fishery-3-03-ll-us-1 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency residuals: 04.LL.ALL.2

<!-- figure: length-frequency-residuals-fishery-4-04-ll-all-2 -->
![Length-frequency bubble residuals for 04.LL.ALL.2. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by length bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-residuals-fishery-4-04-ll-all-2.png){#fig-length-frequency-residuals-fishery-4-04-ll-all-2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency residuals: 05.LL.OS.2

<!-- figure: length-frequency-residuals-fishery-5-05-ll-os-2 -->
![Length-frequency bubble residuals for 05.LL.OS.2. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by length bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-residuals-fishery-5-05-ll-os-2.png){#fig-length-frequency-residuals-fishery-5-05-ll-os-2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency residuals: 06.LL.ARCH.3

<!-- figure: length-frequency-residuals-fishery-6-06-ll-arch-3 -->
![Length-frequency bubble residuals for 06.LL.ARCH.3. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by length bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-residuals-fishery-6-06-ll-arch-3.png){#fig-length-frequency-residuals-fishery-6-06-ll-arch-3 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency residuals: 07.LL.WEST.3

<!-- figure: length-frequency-residuals-fishery-7-07-ll-west-3 -->
![Length-frequency bubble residuals for 07.LL.WEST.3. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by length bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-residuals-fishery-7-07-ll-west-3.png){#fig-length-frequency-residuals-fishery-7-07-ll-west-3 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency residuals: 08.LL.EAST.3

<!-- figure: length-frequency-residuals-fishery-8-08-ll-east-3 -->
![Length-frequency bubble residuals for 08.LL.EAST.3. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by length bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-residuals-fishery-8-08-ll-east-3.png){#fig-length-frequency-residuals-fishery-8-08-ll-east-3 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency residuals: 09.LL.OS.3

<!-- figure: length-frequency-residuals-fishery-9-09-ll-os-3 -->
![Length-frequency bubble residuals for 09.LL.OS.3. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by length bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-residuals-fishery-9-09-ll-os-3.png){#fig-length-frequency-residuals-fishery-9-09-ll-os-3 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency residuals: 10.LL.ALL.5

<!-- figure: length-frequency-residuals-fishery-10-10-ll-all-5 -->
![Length-frequency bubble residuals for 10.LL.ALL.5. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by length bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-residuals-fishery-10-10-ll-all-5.png){#fig-length-frequency-residuals-fishery-10-10-ll-all-5 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency residuals: 11.LL.AU.5

<!-- figure: length-frequency-residuals-fishery-11-11-ll-au-5 -->
![Length-frequency bubble residuals for 11.LL.AU.5. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by length bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-residuals-fishery-11-11-ll-au-5.png){#fig-length-frequency-residuals-fishery-11-11-ll-au-5 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency residuals: 12.PS.JP.1

<!-- figure: length-frequency-residuals-fishery-12-12-ps-jp-1 -->
![Length-frequency bubble residuals for 12.PS.JP.1. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by length bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-residuals-fishery-12-12-ps-jp-1.png){#fig-length-frequency-residuals-fishery-12-12-ps-jp-1 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency residuals: 13.PL.JP.1

<!-- figure: length-frequency-residuals-fishery-13-13-pl-jp-1 -->
![Length-frequency bubble residuals for 13.PL.JP.1. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by length bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-residuals-fishery-13-13-pl-jp-1.png){#fig-length-frequency-residuals-fishery-13-13-pl-jp-1 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency residuals: 14.HL.ID.2

<!-- figure: length-frequency-residuals-fishery-14-14-hl-id-2 -->
![Length-frequency bubble residuals for 14.HL.ID.2. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by length bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-residuals-fishery-14-14-hl-id-2.png){#fig-length-frequency-residuals-fishery-14-14-hl-id-2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency residuals: 15.HL.PH.2

<!-- figure: length-frequency-residuals-fishery-15-15-hl-ph-2 -->
![Length-frequency bubble residuals for 15.HL.PH.2. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by length bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-residuals-fishery-15-15-hl-ph-2.png){#fig-length-frequency-residuals-fishery-15-15-hl-ph-2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency residuals: 16.PL.ALL.2

<!-- figure: length-frequency-residuals-fishery-16-16-pl-all-2 -->
![Length-frequency bubble residuals for 16.PL.ALL.2. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by length bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-residuals-fishery-16-16-pl-all-2.png){#fig-length-frequency-residuals-fishery-16-16-pl-all-2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency residuals: 17.PS.ID.2

<!-- figure: length-frequency-residuals-fishery-17-17-ps-id-2 -->
![Length-frequency bubble residuals for 17.PS.ID.2. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by length bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-residuals-fishery-17-17-ps-id-2.png){#fig-length-frequency-residuals-fishery-17-17-ps-id-2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Length-frequency residuals: 18.PS.PH.2

<!-- figure: length-frequency-residuals-fishery-18-18-ps-ph-2 -->
![Length-frequency bubble residuals for 18.PS.PH.2. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by length bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/length-frequency-residuals-fishery-18-18-ps-ph-2.png){#fig-length-frequency-residuals-fishery-18-18-ps-ph-2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency fits

<!-- figure: weight-frequency -->
![Observed and fitted weight-frequency samples. Bars show observed sample counts and fitted overlays show model predictions; panels identify selected fisheries and years, and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency.png){#fig-weight-frequency fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency residuals

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-residuals -->
![Weight-frequency bubble residuals. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by weight bin, fishery, and year for the selected assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-residuals.png){#fig-weight-frequency-residuals fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency fits: 01.LL.WEST.1

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-fishery-1-01-ll-west-1 -->
![Observed and fitted weight-frequency samples for 01.LL.WEST.1. Bars show observed sample counts by weight bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-fishery-1-01-ll-west-1.png){#fig-weight-frequency-fishery-1-01-ll-west-1 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency fits: 02.LL.EAST.1

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-fishery-2-02-ll-east-1 -->
![Observed and fitted weight-frequency samples for 02.LL.EAST.1. Bars show observed sample counts by weight bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-fishery-2-02-ll-east-1.png){#fig-weight-frequency-fishery-2-02-ll-east-1 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency fits: 03.LL.US.1

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-fishery-3-03-ll-us-1 -->
![Observed and fitted weight-frequency samples for 03.LL.US.1. Bars show observed sample counts by weight bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-fishery-3-03-ll-us-1.png){#fig-weight-frequency-fishery-3-03-ll-us-1 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency fits: 04.LL.ALL.2

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-fishery-4-04-ll-all-2 -->
![Observed and fitted weight-frequency samples for 04.LL.ALL.2. Bars show observed sample counts by weight bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-fishery-4-04-ll-all-2.png){#fig-weight-frequency-fishery-4-04-ll-all-2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency fits: 05.LL.OS.2

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-fishery-5-05-ll-os-2 -->
![Observed and fitted weight-frequency samples for 05.LL.OS.2. Bars show observed sample counts by weight bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-fishery-5-05-ll-os-2.png){#fig-weight-frequency-fishery-5-05-ll-os-2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency fits: 06.LL.ARCH.3

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-fishery-6-06-ll-arch-3 -->
![Observed and fitted weight-frequency samples for 06.LL.ARCH.3. Bars show observed sample counts by weight bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-fishery-6-06-ll-arch-3.png){#fig-weight-frequency-fishery-6-06-ll-arch-3 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency fits: 07.LL.WEST.3

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-fishery-7-07-ll-west-3 -->
![Observed and fitted weight-frequency samples for 07.LL.WEST.3. Bars show observed sample counts by weight bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-fishery-7-07-ll-west-3.png){#fig-weight-frequency-fishery-7-07-ll-west-3 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency fits: 08.LL.EAST.3

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-fishery-8-08-ll-east-3 -->
![Observed and fitted weight-frequency samples for 08.LL.EAST.3. Bars show observed sample counts by weight bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-fishery-8-08-ll-east-3.png){#fig-weight-frequency-fishery-8-08-ll-east-3 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency fits: 09.LL.OS.3

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-fishery-9-09-ll-os-3 -->
![Observed and fitted weight-frequency samples for 09.LL.OS.3. Bars show observed sample counts by weight bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-fishery-9-09-ll-os-3.png){#fig-weight-frequency-fishery-9-09-ll-os-3 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency fits: 10.LL.ALL.5

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-fishery-10-10-ll-all-5 -->
![Observed and fitted weight-frequency samples for 10.LL.ALL.5. Bars show observed sample counts by weight bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-fishery-10-10-ll-all-5.png){#fig-weight-frequency-fishery-10-10-ll-all-5 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency fits: 11.LL.AU.5

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-fishery-11-11-ll-au-5 -->
![Observed and fitted weight-frequency samples for 11.LL.AU.5. Bars show observed sample counts by weight bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-fishery-11-11-ll-au-5.png){#fig-weight-frequency-fishery-11-11-ll-au-5 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency fits: 14.HL.ID.2

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-fishery-14-14-hl-id-2 -->
![Observed and fitted weight-frequency samples for 14.HL.ID.2. Bars show observed sample counts by weight bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-fishery-14-14-hl-id-2.png){#fig-weight-frequency-fishery-14-14-hl-id-2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency fits: 29.Index R1

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-fishery-29-29-index-r1 -->
![Observed and fitted weight-frequency samples for 29.Index R1. Bars show observed sample counts by weight bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-fishery-29-29-index-r1.png){#fig-weight-frequency-fishery-29-29-index-r1 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency fits: 30.Index R2

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-fishery-30-30-index-r2 -->
![Observed and fitted weight-frequency samples for 30.Index R2. Bars show observed sample counts by weight bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-fishery-30-30-index-r2.png){#fig-weight-frequency-fishery-30-30-index-r2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency fits: 31.Index R3

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-fishery-31-31-index-r3 -->
![Observed and fitted weight-frequency samples for 31.Index R3. Bars show observed sample counts by weight bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-fishery-31-31-index-r3.png){#fig-weight-frequency-fishery-31-31-index-r3 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency fits: 32.Index R4

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-fishery-32-32-index-r4 -->
![Observed and fitted weight-frequency samples for 32.Index R4. Bars show observed sample counts by weight bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-fishery-32-32-index-r4.png){#fig-weight-frequency-fishery-32-32-index-r4 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency fits: 33.Index R5

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-fishery-33-33-index-r5 -->
![Observed and fitted weight-frequency samples for 33.Index R5. Bars show observed sample counts by weight bin and fitted lines show model predictions; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-fishery-33-33-index-r5.png){#fig-weight-frequency-fishery-33-33-index-r5 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency residuals: 01.LL.WEST.1

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-1-01-ll-west-1 -->
![Weight-frequency bubble residuals for 01.LL.WEST.1. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by weight bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-1-01-ll-west-1.png){#fig-weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-1-01-ll-west-1 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency residuals: 02.LL.EAST.1

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-2-02-ll-east-1 -->
![Weight-frequency bubble residuals for 02.LL.EAST.1. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by weight bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-2-02-ll-east-1.png){#fig-weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-2-02-ll-east-1 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency residuals: 03.LL.US.1

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-3-03-ll-us-1 -->
![Weight-frequency bubble residuals for 03.LL.US.1. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by weight bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-3-03-ll-us-1.png){#fig-weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-3-03-ll-us-1 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency residuals: 04.LL.ALL.2

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-4-04-ll-all-2 -->
![Weight-frequency bubble residuals for 04.LL.ALL.2. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by weight bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-4-04-ll-all-2.png){#fig-weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-4-04-ll-all-2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency residuals: 05.LL.OS.2

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-5-05-ll-os-2 -->
![Weight-frequency bubble residuals for 05.LL.OS.2. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by weight bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-5-05-ll-os-2.png){#fig-weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-5-05-ll-os-2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency residuals: 06.LL.ARCH.3

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-6-06-ll-arch-3 -->
![Weight-frequency bubble residuals for 06.LL.ARCH.3. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by weight bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-6-06-ll-arch-3.png){#fig-weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-6-06-ll-arch-3 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency residuals: 07.LL.WEST.3

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-7-07-ll-west-3 -->
![Weight-frequency bubble residuals for 07.LL.WEST.3. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by weight bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-7-07-ll-west-3.png){#fig-weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-7-07-ll-west-3 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency residuals: 08.LL.EAST.3

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-8-08-ll-east-3 -->
![Weight-frequency bubble residuals for 08.LL.EAST.3. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by weight bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-8-08-ll-east-3.png){#fig-weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-8-08-ll-east-3 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency residuals: 09.LL.OS.3

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-9-09-ll-os-3 -->
![Weight-frequency bubble residuals for 09.LL.OS.3. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by weight bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-9-09-ll-os-3.png){#fig-weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-9-09-ll-os-3 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency residuals: 10.LL.ALL.5

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-10-10-ll-all-5 -->
![Weight-frequency bubble residuals for 10.LL.ALL.5. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by weight bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-10-10-ll-all-5.png){#fig-weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-10-10-ll-all-5 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency residuals: 11.LL.AU.5

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-11-11-ll-au-5 -->
![Weight-frequency bubble residuals for 11.LL.AU.5. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by weight bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-11-11-ll-au-5.png){#fig-weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-11-11-ll-au-5 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency residuals: 14.HL.ID.2

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-14-14-hl-id-2 -->
![Weight-frequency bubble residuals for 14.HL.ID.2. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by weight bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-14-14-hl-id-2.png){#fig-weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-14-14-hl-id-2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency residuals: 29.Index R1

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-29-29-index-r1 -->
![Weight-frequency bubble residuals for 29.Index R1. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by weight bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-29-29-index-r1.png){#fig-weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-29-29-index-r1 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency residuals: 30.Index R2

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-30-30-index-r2 -->
![Weight-frequency bubble residuals for 30.Index R2. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by weight bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-30-30-index-r2.png){#fig-weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-30-30-index-r2 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency residuals: 31.Index R3

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-31-31-index-r3 -->
![Weight-frequency bubble residuals for 31.Index R3. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by weight bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-31-31-index-r3.png){#fig-weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-31-31-index-r3 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency residuals: 32.Index R4

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-32-32-index-r4 -->
![Weight-frequency bubble residuals for 32.Index R4. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by weight bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-32-32-index-r4.png){#fig-weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-32-32-index-r4 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Weight-frequency residuals: 33.Index R5

<!-- figure: weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-33-33-index-r5 -->
![Weight-frequency bubble residuals for 33.Index R5. Bubble size and sign show observed-minus-fitted residual structure by weight bin; panels identify selected years and legends identify assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-33-33-index-r5.png){#fig-weight-frequency-residuals-fishery-33-33-index-r5 fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Fishery selectivity at age

<!-- figure: fishery-process -->
![Age-based fishery selectivity. Curves show estimated selectivity by age class for selected fisheries; facets and legends identify fisheries and assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/fishery-process.png){#fig-fishery-process fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Fishery selectivity at length

<!-- figure: fishery-selectivity-length -->
![Length-based fishery selectivity. Curves show estimated selectivity by length for selected fisheries; facets and legends identify fisheries and assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/fishery-selectivity-length.png){#fig-fishery-selectivity-length fig-align="center" width=100%}

### Fishery selectivity at weight

<!-- figure: fishery-selectivity-weight -->
![Weight-based fishery selectivity. Curves show estimated selectivity by weight for selected fisheries; facets and legends identify fisheries and assessment models.](generated/outputs/figures/fishery-selectivity-weight.png){#fig-fishery-selectivity-weight fig-align="center" width=100%}
